name: Flaming Sphere
description: You create a 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet, rolling it along the ground. If you move the sphere into a creature's space, that creature makes the save against the sphere, and the sphere stops moving for the turn. Engine: the sphere is a summon NPC (HP 1000 / AC 99 / fire-immune) with `summonSpellId='flaming-sphere'`; click it on the map to enter the move-direct picker, which consumes a Bonus Action instead of an Action and resolves the on-collision save against the targeted occupant. The 5-ft / 10-ft barriers + flammable-objects + Bright/Dim Light flavour is descriptive only.
scaling: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.
